issues.description: Aspect ratio 20.0:1 exceeds 15:1 — chatter risk (CNC) or warping (3D print)
issues.suggestion: Add ribs or supports, or split into subassemblies

issues.description: High face density (8.8 faces/cm3) — may indicate tight internal radii
issues.suggestion: Verify minimum internal corner radius is >= 1mm for standard endmills

issues.description: Aspect ratio 20.0:1 exceeds 15:1 — chatter risk (CNC) or warping (3D print)
issues.suggestion: Consider using a CNC machine with high rigidity and vibration damping, or redesign the part to reduce the aspect ratio.

issues.description: High face density (8.8 faces/cm3) — may indicate tight internal radii
issues.suggestion: Review the design for any potential internal stress concentrations and consider redesigning to reduce complexity.
